title: RAG, From Scratch
tagline: Retrieve neighbours, condition the LM — how retrieval-augmented generation actually works
summary: A step-by-step walkthrough that builds RAG from two things you already know: next-token prediction and k-nearest neighbours. Interactive 2D embeddings, live retrieval, prompt assembly, and examples across air quality, cooking, and history.
highlights: Drag a query point in 2D embedding space and watch kNN retrieval pick the closest documents.
See the full pipeline: embed, retrieve, build prompt, generate — with concrete examples at every step.
Switch between four domains (air quality, cooking, history, medical) to see RAG adapt to different knowledge.
Understand why RAG works probabilistically: parametric + non-parametric memory.
